summary_en: Policy update on cost-of-capital and stock-price conscious management. Board approved concrete improvement initiatives to realize medium-to-long-term enterprise value growth and sustainable expansion. Specific targets and metrics to be detailed in attached materials.
title_en: Initiatives Towards Realizing Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, Totetsu Kogyo's board of directors approved an update to its cost-of-capital and stock-price conscious management policy. The company has analyzed its current position and formulated concrete improvement initiatives aimed at realizing medium-to-long-term enterprise value growth and sustainable expansion. Specific targets, metrics, and implementation timelines are provided in the attached materials referenced in the disclosure.
